zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Hungerford於1330年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Walter de Hungerford11327歲，母親Elizabeth FitzJohn18歲。他和Joan Hussey至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他於1377年在英國英格蘭被列為speaker of the house of commons。他去世於1398年12月3日在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特法爾 格福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Hungerford于1330年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Walter de Hungerford11327岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzJohn18岁。他和Joan Hussey至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他于1377年在英国英格兰被列为speaker of the house of commons。他去世于1398年12月3日在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特法爾 格福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Hungerford was born in 1330, in Somerset, England, his father, Walter de Hungerford, was 11327 and his mother, Elizabeth FitzJohn, was 18. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Hussey. In 1377, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as speaker of the house of commons in England, United Kingdom. He died on 3 December 1398, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Hungerford est né en 1330, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Hungerford, avait 11327 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzJohn, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Hussey. En 1377, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est speaker of the house of commons à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1398, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Hungerford 1330 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Hungerford 11327 und seine Mutter Elizabeth FitzJohn 18. Er hatte mit Joan Hussey mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1377, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als speaker of the house of commons in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1398 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England und wurde in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Hungerford è nato il nel 1330 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Walter de Hungerford, aveva 11327 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth FitzJohn, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Hussey. Nel 1377, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come speaker of the house of commons nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 3 dicembre 1398, nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Hungerfordが1330年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Walter de Hungerfordは11327歳，母Elizabeth FitzJohnは18歳であった。彼はJoan Husseyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1377年，47歳の時，イギリスイギリスでの職業はspeaker of the house of commonsと記録されている。彼は1398年12月3日にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Hungerford(이)가 1330년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Hungerford(은)는 11327세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzJohn(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Joan Hussey(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1377년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 speaker of the house of commons이었다. 그는 1398년 12월 3일 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Hungerford nasceu em 1330, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Hungerford, tinha 11327 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzJohn, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Hussey. Em 1377, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como speaker of the house of commons em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1398, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Hungerford родился в 1330 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Hungerford было 11327 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzJohn, 18. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Joan Hussey. В 1377 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии speaker of the house of commons в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 3 декабря 1398 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Hungerford nació en 1330, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Hungerford, tenía 11327 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzJohn, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Hussey. En 1377, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era speaker of the house of commons en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1398, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
